chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 492 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 17.10.2024 None has appeared on behalf of the applicant nor any intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. The continuous absence on the part of the applicant and his counsel prima facie suggests that they are no more interested to pursue the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge ARBROHI
